meta.title: Plebi — Run Your Own Book of Business
meta.description: Scheduling and business-management software for independent drivers. Keep your regulars, manage your schedule, work on your terms.

hero.tagline: Independent contractor? Let's actually get you there.
hero.subtagline: Plebi is the scheduling and business tool for independent drivers. Keep your regulars. Manage your schedule. Work on your terms.

signup.newsletterLabel: I'd like to receive occasional updates about Plebi's launch and news
signup.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
signup.errorInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
signup.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Sign up and verify your credentials
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload your license, insurance, and any local permits. We verify your documents to ensure your passengers know exactly who's driving.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Once you're verified, your profile goes live and you can start taking bookings. Most verifications are completed within a few business days.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Give your QR code or booking link to great customers after a ride. Your regulars can book you directly — one-time rides or standing appointments for recurring schedules.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Easily add expenses to your automatic monthly data export. Negotiate fares directly. See route conflicts before accepting a ride. Optional location sharing with privacy controls you set.

features.heading: Built for how you actually work.
features.intro: Plebi is scheduling and business-management software for independent drivers — not a company that takes a cut of your work.

listing.title: A listing fee, not a commission
listing.description: You keep what you earn. Plebi charges a flat subscription — we never take a percentage of your fares.

freedom.title: No ratings trap, no deactivation threats
freedom.description: Your listing, your rules. No coercive rating systems. No algorithms deciding whether you get to work tomorrow.

schedule.title: Organize your schedule
schedule.description: Manage your availability, your regulars, and your bookings from one place. See your week at a glance.

experience.title: Built by someone who knows the work
experience.description: Designed with 16 years of taxi-industry experience. For professionals, by someone who understands what professionals need.

passengers.heading: What your passengers get.
passengers.intro: When your riders book through Plebi, they get a better experience — and you keep the relationship.

easyBooking.title: Easy rebooking
easyBooking.description: After a great ride, passengers scan your QR code or tap a link to book you again directly. No searching, no dispatch lottery.

directRelationship.title: They choose you, specifically
directRelationship.description: Your passengers see your profile, your availability, and book you — not a random driver assigned by an algorithm.

safety.title: Safety features they'll trust
safety.description: Ride details shared with contacts. Your passengers feel safe because they know exactly who's driving.

accessible.title: Accessible to more riders
accessible.description: Built-in accessibility features for visually impaired passengers and anyone who needs extra clarity about their ride.

mission.heading: Your business deserves real tools.
mission.p1: The gig economy promised independence and delivered dependency. Drivers lost control of their schedules, their customer relationships, and their professional dignity — all to platforms that treat them as interchangeable inputs.
mission.p2: Plebi gives you the software to run your own book of business. We don't employ you. We don't dispatch your rides. We don't decide your fares. We build the tools you need to manage your own schedule, keep your own regulars, and grow your own business.
mission.p3: The name comes from Latin: plebi means "for the common people." That's whose side we're on — the people doing the work.
